title: Live Inspired Podcast
excerpt: Recently I had a great conversation with Tracie Claiborne about the process of self-publishing and other insights into writing a book on her podcast, Live Inspired . I'm passionate about sharing my experiences with others, so being able to discuss…
body:
Recently I had a great conversation with Tracie Claiborne about the process of self-publishing and other insights into writing a book on her podcast, Live Inspired. I'm passionate about sharing my experiences with others, so being able to discuss the trajectory of the book-making journey is such a treat. Tracie is a gracious host and totally made me blush when she declared that my book is now her "go-to manual on living a creative life." What! That's a huge compliment. I am so thrilled that my words are inspiring others.

You can here our conversation here and, as always, find my book here (currently only $19 instead of $25 for a short time) - Thanks so much for your support!
